title: Lush End
description: A pack that makes The End more lively by adding grass and thin trees
body:
# Lush End

This pack makes The End much more alive by adding grass and some thin trees!

## **‼️‼️ [OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/downloads) OR [CONTINUITY](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) MOD REQUIRED.‼️‼️**

Features:
- End dirt
- Biome specific grass
- Chorus trees
- End dirt bricks (recolored mud bricks)
- Purple purpur

Credit:
- Biome dependant End grass: [End Grass by guhlactic](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/end-grass)
- Bushy leaves texture: [Better Leaves by PandaDEV](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/betterleaves)
